{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Officer",
  "description": "Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos.Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration &ndash; whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	&lrm;Running company social media advertising campaigns.
	&lrm;Formulating high-quality novel written and visual content for each social media campaign.
	&lrm;Building a social media presence by maintaining a solid online presence.
	&lrm;Monitoring the company&#39;s brand on social media.
	&lrm;Building brand awareness by engaging relevant influencers.
	&lrm;Managing our online communities to ensure respectful and appropriate engagement.
	&lrm;Responding to comments on each of our accounts.
	&lrm;Overseeing customer service provided via social media.
	&lrm;Analyzing data to determine whether social media campaigns have achieved their objectives.
	&lrm;Coaching employees company-wide on content creation best practices.


&lrm;Requirements


	&lrm;Social media marketing experience.
	&lrm;Experience developing social media strategies.
	&lrm;Experience working with and developing a marketing plan.
	&lrm;Ability to develop the right voice for each social media platform.
	&lrm;Proven ability to build social media communities.
	&lrm;Understanding of graphic design principles.
	&lrm;Experience as a Brand Manager on social media.
	&lrm;Ability to measure the success of campaigns.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to:&nbsp;hr@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;lillian.owoseni@luxsitintegration.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Social Media Officer Job at Luxsit Integration Limited




        
    

        
        Luxsit Integration Limited is a smart home solution company located in the heart of Lagos.Our main focus is to bring people and technology together. We handle all aspects of your technology project including design, scheduling, project management, installation, and service and support. We are a customer service-oriented company and strive for complete customer satisfaction. With our experienced and trained dedicated team of tech experts, bringing your dreams to reality. At Luxsit integration – whether the project is new construction or retrofit, we integrate seamlessly with all involved to deliver custom, lifestyle inspired solutions across the spectrum of automation, audio/video, cinema rooms, lighting, climate, and security.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	‎Running company social media advertising campaigns.
	‎Formulating high-quality novel written and visual content for each social media campaign.
	‎Building a social media presence by maintaining a solid online presence.
	‎Monitoring the company's brand on social media.
	‎Building brand awareness by engaging relevant influencers.
	‎Managing our online communities to ensure respectful and appropriate engagement.
	‎Responding to comments on each of our accounts.
	‎Overseeing customer service provided via social media.
	‎Analyzing data to determine whether social media campaigns have achieved their objectives.
	‎Coaching employees company-wide on content creation best practices.


‎Requirements


	‎Social media marketing experience.
	‎Experience developing social media strategies.
	‎Experience working with and developing a marketing plan.
	‎Ability to develop the right voice for each social media platform.
	‎Proven ability to build social media communities.
	‎Understanding of graphic design principles.
	‎Experience as a Brand Manager on social media.
	‎Ability to measure the success of campaigns.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "Wahala No Dey Finish - Come Chop is a food content brand that focuses on creating engaging video content and high-quality visuals. They are active on platforms like YouTube and Facebook, showcasing food-related challenges and culinary showdowns, aiming to build an active and positive online community around their unique brand identity in the food content industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Key Responsibilities
Platform Management and Community Engagement:


	Actively foster an engaged and positive online community, encouraging discussions and user-generated content.
	Monitor social media channels for trends, feedback, and opportunities for engagement.
	Content Strategy and Calendar Planning
	Performance Analysis and Reporting.


Qualifications and Skills


	Experience as a Social Media Manager or similar role, with a strong track record of managing and growing social media platforms.
	Passion for food content and a desire to contribute to a growing brand.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolioto:&nbsp;contactwahalanodeyfinish@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Social Media Manager Job at Wahala No Dey Finish




        
    

        
        Wahala No Dey Finish - Come Chop is a food content brand that focuses on creating engaging video content and high-quality visuals. They are active on platforms like YouTube and Facebook, showcasing food-related challenges and culinary showdowns, aiming to build an active and positive online community around their unique brand identity in the food content industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Key Responsibilities
Platform Management and Community Engagement:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Actively foster an engaged and positive online community, encouraging discussions and user-generated content.
	Monitor social media channels for trends, feedback, and opportunities for engagement.
	Content Strategy and Calendar Planning
	Performance Analysis and Reporting.


Qualifications and Skills


	Experience as a Social Media Manager or similar role, with a strong track record of managing and growing social media platforms.
	Passion for food content and a desire to contribute to a growing brand.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolioto: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Wahala No Dey Finish - Come Chop is a food content brand that focuses on creating engaging video content and high-quality visuals. They are active on platforms like YouTube and Facebook, showcasing food-related challenges and culinary showdowns, aiming to build an active and positive online community around their unique brand identity in the food content industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator and Videographer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Responsibilities
Content Strategy and Planning:


	Collaborate with the team to develop and implement a comprehensive content strategy aligned with the brand&#39;s vision, tone, and values.


Video Production and Editing:


	Operate video and photography equipment to capture high-quality footage and images.
	Edit raw video footage into compelling narratives, incorporating graphics, music, and sound effects to enhance viewer experience.


Qualifications and Skills


	Proven experience as a Content Creator, Video Producer, or similar role, with a strong portfolio showcasing video production and editing skills.
	Demonstrable expertise in shooting and editing video content, with proficiency in video editing software (e.g., CapCut Pro,Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve).
	Strong understanding of visual storytelling principles and an eye for aesthetics.
	Familiarity with various social media platforms and their content requirements (especially YouTube and Instagram).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolioto:&nbsp;contactwahalanodeyfinish@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Content Creator and Videographer Job at Wahala No Dey Finish




        
    

        
        Wahala No Dey Finish - Come Chop is a food content brand that focuses on creating engaging video content and high-quality visuals. They are active on platforms like YouTube and Facebook, showcasing food-related challenges and culinary showdowns, aiming to build an active and positive online community around their unique brand identity in the food content industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator and Videographer

Job Location: Lagos

Responsibilities
Content Strategy and Planning:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Collaborate with the team to develop and implement a comprehensive content strategy aligned with the brand's vision, tone, and values.


Video Production and Editing:


	Operate video and photography equipment to capture high-quality footage and images.
	Edit raw video footage into compelling narratives, incorporating graphics, music, and sound effects to enhance viewer experience.


Qualifications and Skills


	Proven experience as a Content Creator, Video Producer, or similar role, with a strong portfolio showcasing video production and editing skills.
	Demonstrable expertise in shooting and editing video content, with proficiency in video editing software (e.g., CapCut Pro,Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve).
	Strong understanding of visual storytelling principles and an eye for aesthetics.
	Familiarity with various social media platforms and their content requirements (especially YouTube and Instagram).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolioto: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chief Human Resources Officer",
  "description": "Akinkunbi Nigeria limited is an indigenous building and civil engineering construction firm established to manage the production of building processes of any type within cost and time limit without compromising the ethics and specification.We specialize in consultancy works,building services,maintenance/renovation work of dilapidated structures and facility management of structure in all its ramifications.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Human Resources Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We are looking for a Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO) to lead our HR department.


Responsibilities


	Craft talent acquisition strategies to build strong pipelines for future hiring needs
	Formulate career development plans
	Promote inclusion in the workplace and reinforce our position as an equal opportunity employer
	Ensure our hiring, onboarding and management procedures are effective for diverse groups
	Lead employer branding efforts (like recruitment marketing)
	Supervise HR Directors
	Evaluate training and development programs
	Develop HR policies for all branches, countries, regions
	Analyze the effectiveness of our HR procedures and tools
	Ensure HR plans align with our mission and business objectives


Requirements


	Experience in strategic planning
	In-depth knowledge of all HR functions
	Hands-on experience with HR software (HRIS, ATS)
	Good understanding of labor legislation
	Excellent leadership abilities
	Communication and problem-solving skills


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;akinkunbinigerialimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Chief Human Resources Officer Job at Akinkunbi Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Akinkunbi Nigeria limited is an indigenous building and civil engineering construction firm established to manage the production of building processes of any type within cost and time limit without compromising the ethics and specification.We specialize in consultancy works,building services,maintenance/renovation work of dilapidated structures and facility management of structure in all its ramifications.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Human Resources Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO) to lead our HR department.


Responsibilities


	Craft talent acquisition strategies to build strong pipelines for future hiring needs
	Formulate career development plans
	Promote inclusion in the workplace and reinforce our position as an equal opportunity employer
	Ensure our hiring, onboarding and management procedures are effective for diverse groups
	Lead employer branding efforts (like recruitment marketing)
	Supervise HR Directors
	Evaluate training and development programs
	Develop HR policies for all branches, countries, regions
	Analyze the effectiveness of our HR procedures and tools
	Ensure HR plans align with our mission and business objectives


Requirements


	Experience in strategic planning
	In-depth knowledge of all HR functions
	Hands-on experience with HR software (HRIS, ATS)
	Good understanding of labor legislation
	Excellent leadership abilities
	Communication and problem-solving skills


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
